case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MARSHMANI, CARMEN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHMANI, CARMEN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,677.60 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHMANI, CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSHMANI, CARMEN $3,677.60 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,703.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-03-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-15-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
